description: Source chunker partitions a large prose document at section boundaries with overlap
prompt: You are the source-chunker agent. Process a 40-page industry whitepaper (approximately 30K tokens) in markdown format with H1 and H2 headings. The document covers AI adoption trends in manufacturing. Partition it for a trend-analysis dimension analyst.

expectations.description: Chunking or partitioning is applied to the document
Overlap between chunks is maintained for context continuity
Section headings are used as split boundaries
Splits at section boundaries with 10% overlap to preserve context across chunk boundaries

description: Source chunker groups structured CSV/table data by logical entity or time period
prompt: You are the source-chunker agent. Process a large CSV file with 10,000 rows of quarterly revenue data for 200 SaaS companies spanning 2020-2025. Partition it for a financial-analysis dimension analyst.

expectations.description: Row-based or logical grouping strategy is used
Chunking is applied to the structured data
Groups rows by logical entity (company) or time period (quarter) rather than arbitrary row counts

description: Source chunker splits large JSON responses at top-level array boundaries
prompt: You are the source-chunker agent. Process a large JSON API response containing an array of 2,000 company profiles (approximately 40K tokens). Each element has name, financials, and competitive data. Partition it for a competitive-analysis dimension analyst.

expectations.description: Array element boundaries are used for splitting
Chunking is applied to the JSON data
Splits at top-level array element boundaries preserving each company profile as a complete object

description: Source chunker returns content directly without chunking when document is under the threshold
prompt: You are the source-chunker agent. Process a 3-page blog post (approximately 5,000 tokens) about market trends in the cybersecurity space. Should this be chunked?

expectations.description: Chunking is not applied to the small document
Returns the content directly without chunking since the document is well under the 15K token threshold

description: Source chunker spawns chunk analysts in parallel batches respecting the concurrency limit
prompt: You are the source-chunker agent. You have partitioned a large document into 8 chunks. Describe how you spawn chunk analysts to process them in parallel.

expectations.description: Chunk analysts are referenced for parallel processing
Batch size limit is acknowledged
Spawns chunk analysts in batches of max 5 concurrent, with the remaining 3 queued for the second batch

description: Source chunker deduplicates findings from overlapping regions between adjacent chunks
prompt: You are the source-chunker agent. Two adjacent chunk analysts returned findings that overlap because of the 10% overlap region. Chunk 3 found 'Market growing at 25% CAGR' and chunk 4 found 'Growth rate of 25% CAGR expected through 2027'. How do you handle this?

expectations.description: Deduplication or merging of overlapping findings is addressed
Overlapping findings are merged into a single finding rather than being reported as separate discoveries

description: Source chunker synthesizes findings from all chunk analysts into a consolidated output
prompt: You are the source-chunker agent. All 6 chunk analysts have completed processing a large industry report. Chunk 1 found partial data about Company X's revenue, and chunk 4 found the rest. Chunk 2 references a trend that chunk 5 quantifies. Describe your synthesis process.

expectations.description: Synthesis or consolidation of findings is performed
Output includes a findings structure
Cross-chunk references are resolved (partial findings merged, trend references connected to quantified data) producing a unified findings array
